title: Embers
description: A night sky of drifting embers rising from an unseen fire — sparks lift on the updraft, swirl in turbulent air, flicker as they cool from white-hot to deep red, and wink out. Beats throw up a burst of fresh sparks and gusts of wind shear the whole column sideways. Spawn rate, updraft, turbulence, wind, glow and cooling are live and mappable.
